title: The Conflict Becomes Larger

dialogue.text: It's quite a sight to see...

dialogue.text: Hey, Tra- dude. I've been wondering how

summary: The Conflict Becomes Larger. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
